about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Get to know me
about.description_1: I'm a developer passionate about technology and innovation. I specialize in creating modern, scalable web applications with exceptional user interfaces.
about.description_2: Throughout my career, I have worked on challenging projects ranging from e-commerce platforms to complex analytics dashboards, always striving for excellence in every line of code.
about.description_3: I currently focus on the Angular ecosystem, TypeScript and modern frontend architectures. I firmly believe in continuous learning and sharing knowledge with the community.

contact.connect_text: I'm always open to new opportunities, collaborations and interesting conversations. Don't hesitate to reach out.
